description_for_human: Find the best vacation deals from 25+ timeshare resort brands. Compare prices across 50+ destinations starting at $59.
description_for_model: Search and compare vacation deals (also known as vacpacks or timeshare preview packages) from 25+ resort brands across 50+ destinations. Returns real-time pricing, inclusions, duration, and booking links. Deals range from $59-$499 for 2-7 night premium resort stays.
